Design_Description: Add 15% uniform spatial token dropout to cross-attention during training by masking random spatial tokens via `key_padding_mask`, leaving inference unchanged.

Add 30% uniform spatial token dropout to cross-attention during training via `key_padding_mask`, leaving inference unchanged; tests whether higher drop rate yields stronger regularisation than design001's p=0.15.

Apply spatial token dropout starting at p=0.30 for epochs 1–10 and annealing linearly to p=0.10 for epochs 11–20, via a custom MMEngine hook (`SpatialDropAnnealHook`) registered in `pose3d_transformer_head.py`.
